prompt: A candid, realistic smartphone photo of five men having an intense discussion around a dark wooden conference table in a modern, minimalist office. On the mid-left, a man resembling Sam Altman in a green sweater gestures with his hands while speaking. In the center, a man resembling Mark Zuckerberg in a grey t-shirt listens intently. On the mid-right, a man resembling Elon Musk in a black jacket gestures while responding. Two other men wearing glasses and dark sweaters sit at the far ends of the table, observing with their hands near their faces. The table is cluttered with 3 white ceramic mugs, 3 clear drinking glasses, 1 silver soda can, open laptops, tablets, scattered papers, notebooks, and tangled black cables. The room features plain white walls and a large black-framed window revealing trees outside. The lighting is indoor and slightly grainy, giving it an authentic, leaked behind-the-scenes aesthetic.
